examples: So what are the requirements for godhood. What makes a good god?
This is their opportunity to experience their growing in Godhood in a beautiful new place.
His inability to claim his godhood comes from not knowing that he is the champion of his own cause.
With sword, spear, and shield in hand, you will sneak, conspire, loot, and battle your way through majestic palaces and chthonic depths as you climb towards godhood.
